docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY EVANGELISTA, ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS : [X] PAYMENTS OF $ 300.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING MARCH 15, 2018. UNTIL DECEMBER 15, 2020, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT OF $ 100.00.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0418718D007, TAG # 035467 (PAYMENT #2) BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-30-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINITFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE ORGINIAL PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE DATE COMPELETED BY THE SERVER AT LEAST FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE. PLAINITFF ROBERTO EVANGELISTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERTO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. KAREN RODRIGUEZ WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRTERS OATH AND ASSISTED WITH SPANISH INTERPRETATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2018 BY CECILIA CASTELLANOS 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERTO EVANGELISTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERTO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ELLEN ROSENTHAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF (MAILED 7/19/18) FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 175.00 SERVED NOV-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 175.00 - SERVED NOV-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANGELISTA, ROBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALBERTO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,250.00, $10,000.00 FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND TO COMPENSATE PLAINTIFF FOR COST OF REPAIR OF DEFECTIVE WORK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.
